skills.name: Iron Maiden
skills.description: Summon an Iron Maiden to trap a medium or small-sized enemy, excluding boss monsters. Trapped enemies cannot move for a certain amount of time, and damages constantly when the enemy is devil-type or when the caster is under Judgment buff.
skills.effect_text:
Duration: CaptionTime seconds
Decreases maximum HP of enemy by 3%

skills.name: Pear of Anguish
skills.description: Install a Pear of Anguish on the ground that deals damage to incoming enemies. If a magic-using enemy is detected, it automatically flies over to it.
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor: SkillFactor %
Maximum Number of Installations: CaptionRatio2

skills.name: Breaking Wheel
skills.description: Summon a wheel that inflicts damage to surrounding enemies.
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor: SkillFactor % per 0.3 seconds
Duration: CaptionTime seconds

skills.name: God Smash
skills.description: Lift your weapon high up in the air above your head and smash it down. Partially ignores enemy defense.
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor: SkillFactor %
AoE Attack Ratio: SkillSR
Ignores 15% of enemy Defense

skills.name: Malleus Maleficarum
skills.description: Release the power of a spellbook to attack. The attacked enemy will have their INT and SPR halved and doubles the SP consumption of magic attacks when used during debuff duration.
skills.effect_text:
Skill factor: SkillFactor % x 7 times
Duration: 10 seconds
Applied to 7 targets maximum

skills.name: Judgment
skills.description: Judgment buff that increases the Critical Chance is applied, and you can activate the Inquisitor skill's ability during the buff.

skills.name: Ripper
skills.description: Summon a pair of gigantic scissors continuously attacking enemies in front of you. The skill does not cancel even if you are attacked and it deals increased damage when the enemy is Devil-type or when the caster is under Judgment. Damage increases when attacking continuously.
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor: SkillFactor %
Maximum Duration: 3 seconds
Targets: CaptionRatio

attributes.name: Inquisitor: Burn
attributes.description:
* Has 20% chance to ignite a flame where the enemy has fell when defeated

* Does damage to a maximum of 5 enemies

* Maximum of 3 flames ignited

attributes.name: Pear of Anguish: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Pear of Anguish] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Breaking Wheel: Additional Damage
attributes.description:
* When the caster hits the wheel while [Breaking Wheel] is active, the range temporarily increases and deals 12% damage to enemies outside the original range

* Increases SP consumption by 30%

attributes.name: Inquisitor: Darkness Resistance
attributes.description: * Darkness property resistance increases by 10 per attribute level

attributes.name: God Smash: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [God Smash] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Malleus Maleficarum: Mana Burn
attributes.description:
* In PvP, [Malleus Maleficarum] reduces the SP of an enemy by 5% of its current amount per attribute level. In PvE, it silences the monster

* Increases SP consumption by 10%

attributes.name: God Smash: Demon Punisher
attributes.description:
* Increases [God Smash] damage by 10% per attribute level when Demon enemies or caster is under Judgement buff

* Increases SP consumption by 10%

attributes.name: Breaking Wheel: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Breaking Wheel] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Malleus Maleficarum: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Malleus Maleficarum] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Judgment: Provoke
attributes.description:
* Using [Judgment] provokes enemies in a range of 100 from the caster

* Increases SP consumption by 20%

attributes.name: Ripper: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Ripper] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Inquisitor: Torture Expert
attributes.description:
* Reduces the cooldown of torture skills by 1 sec when an enemy is defeated by those skills

Applies to:

- Iron Maiden

- Pear of Anguish

- Breaking Wheel

- Ripper

attributes.name: Iron Maiden: God Smash
attributes.description:
* Doubles damage dealt with [God Smash] to enemies trapped by [Iron Maiden]

* Increases SP consumption by 30%

attributes.name: Ripper: Armor Break
attributes.description:
* [Ripper] attack ignores enemy's Defense by 3% per attribute level

* Increases SP consumption by 20%

attributes.name: Breaking Wheel: Reinforce
attributes.description:
* Increases the duration of the wheel by 1 second per attribute level

* Increases SP consumption by 20%

attributes.name: [Arts] Torture Expert: Fire
attributes.description:
* [Inquisitor: Torture Expert] now generates an [Inquisitor: Burn] flame nearby.

* Increases the maximum number of flames from [Inquisitor: Burn] by 3.

attributes.name: [Arts] Pear of Anguish: Enhanced Upgrade
attributes.description: * Increases the Skill Factor of [Pear of Anguish] by 1.25% per attribute level

attributes.name: [Arts] Breaking Wheel: Enhanced Upgrade
attributes.description: * Increases the Skill Factor of [Breaking Wheel] by 1.25% per attribute level

attributes.name: [Arts] God Smash: Enhanced Upgrade
attributes.description: * Increases the Skill Factor of [God Smash] by 1.25% per attribute level

attributes.name: [Arts] Malleus Maleficarum: Enhanced Upgrade
attributes.description: * Increases the Skill Factor of [Malleus Maleficarum] by 1.25% per attribute level
